name: Tom Tiffany & Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Give the D.C. liberals a taste of Wisconsin!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Fight the radical socialist agenda and take back the majority! PeterIt took Hugo Chavez years to push Venezuela's once-prosperous economy to brink of collapse. But just over 100 days into Joe Biden's term, he and Nancy Pelosi's "rubber stamp" Congress are taking our country down that same dangerous road.In a few short months, our country has gone from being a global energy powerhouse to empty service stations and Americans waiting in 1970s-style lines for gasoline.

And if we don't do something, this will only be the beginning. [That's why we need your support - today!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mkjhtdy-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [[Click Here - Join Us to Stand Up to Socialism!]](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mkjhtdy-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Joe Biden's failure to prevent the cyberattack on the Colonial Pipeline that has left thousands of Americans running on fumes isn't a one-off fluke. _**Remember, radicals on the Far Left have been dreaming for years of doing what those hackers just pulled off**_ : Shutting down access to affordable American energy and the pipelines that we rely on for its delivery.

Since taking office, Joe Biden shut down the Keystone XL pipeline, and moved to shut down American oil and gas development on public land. And he and his backers are just getting started. If they get their way, the gas lines and fuel shortages gripping parts of our country today could go national tomorrow.

Right next door in Michigan, radical Democrat Governor Gretchen Whitmer - who has spent more than a year strangling her state's economy - is looking to take her job-killing agenda to the next level by trying to shut down a key energy pipeline in our backyard: The Wisconsin-based Enbridge Line 5, which serves several midwestern states and our neighbors in Canada.

Here is the bottom line: Our economy depends on affordable, abundant, Made in America energy. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed policies are already hitting the brakes on American jobs and opportunity - **[_and we need your help to stop them._](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mkjhtdy-ahkdjtlkr-j/)**

For liberty, Congressman Scott Fitzgerald (WI-05)
Congressman Tom Tiffany (WI-07) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mkjhtdy-ahkdjtlkr-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mkjhtdy-ahkdjtlkr-i/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mkjhtdy-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-mkjhtdy-ahkdjtlkr-h/)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: A Washington Post hit piece
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482712:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "Headline") Peter: I'm now a 41-year-old member of the United States Senate, a father, husband, Christian, and former clerk for the Chief Justice of the United States Supreme Court, and former Attorney General for my state. None of that seems to matter to the left. Just the other day, _The Washington Post_ published a profile story on me, and they thought it was more important to find out why someone who attended Middle School with me is disappointed that we have divergent political views and then accuse my hometown of being inherently racist. This is how Conservatives are treated in this nation when they stand up for their beliefs. They will look for any way to hurt us. They even have someone suggesting I should wear an "S" on my shirt for "sedition." **[If the Swamp is willing to go this far to destroy me, it is clear they are only just getting started. That is why I am writing today asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482712:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "If the Swamp is willing to go this far to destroy me, it
is clear they are only just getting started. That is why I am writing today asking for your help.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482712:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "Childhood home")I knew that Big Tech would try to make me pay when I started standing up to them, but I never expected Jeff Bezos to go this far. I'm not joking - **_The Washington Post_ tracked down a person I worked with when I was 12 years old** to see what they thought of my objection. They interviewed friends of mine from high school; they **_even hid behind bushes to take a picture of my childhood home and looked into the books I read as a child._** **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $1200, even just $45 will let Big Tech and the Media know that their scare tactics won't work on American Conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482713:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $1200, even just $45 will
let Big Tech and the Media know that their scare tactics won’t work on American Conservatives.")** **They just want to punish me for standing up for YOU and formally objecting to the 2020 election results. It isn 't going to work, and it won't stop me from keeping up my fight against Big Tech.** I did not come to Washington to win a popularity contest with the establishment. It is my job to represent the people of Missouri, and I knew that the Swamp would try to make me pay. They have already tried to cancel me. Antifa showed up at my home here while my wife and 4-month-old daughter were home. Now, the radical left is looking into my actions when I was a child to intimidate me. Still, they never seem to care when we have Members of Congress siding with known terrorists in the Middle East instead of our best ally, Israel. While they have the wrong priorities, their tactics won't work on me - but it helps to know who is still standing with me. **[Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more, so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482714:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "Will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50 or more, so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly
appreciated.")** The last time I wrote you, I told you that it was a question of "when" the Swamp would come after me. _I was right, and we can now all see how far they are willing to go._ **[I'm going to fight back. Are you with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482713:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "I’m going to fight back. Are you with me?")** For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482712:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri P.S. Bezos and _The Washington Post_ aren't done with me. I need to be ready the next time they interview someone I shared fingerpaints with when I was five years old. **[I need your help to fend off their ridiculous smears. Please donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482712:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "I need your help to fend off their ridiculous smears. Please
donate today.")** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57482712:67rdJ1l2N:m:1:3206719985:C6339DD5AE27B11591FD31AF3A3584F9:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
---

I did not come to Washington to win a popularity contest with the establishment. It is my job to represent the people of Missouri, and I knew that the Swamp would try to make me pay. They have already tried to cancel me. Antifa showed up at my home here while my wife and 4-month-old daughter were home. Now, the radical left is looking into my actions when I was a child to intimidate me. Still, they never seem to care when we have Members of Congress siding with known terrorists in the Middle East instead of our best ally, Israel. While they have the wrong priorities, their tactics won't work on me - but it helps to know who is still standing with me. "Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more, so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated." The last time I wrote you, I told you that it was a question of "when" the Swamp would come after me. I was right, and we can now all see how far they are willing to go. "I’m going to fight back. Are you with me?" For America, "Josh Hawley" Josh Hawley U.S. Senator, Missouri P.S. Bezos and The Washington Post aren't done with me. I need to be ready the next time they interview someone I shared fingerpaints with when I was five years old. "I need your help to fend off their ridiculous smears. Please donate today." | | "STAND WITH JOSH" | PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 22, 2020. name: Paul Begala
subject: It’s Trump’s playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
And now it's Glenn Youngkin's.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29670871/287134305/-2023814932?refcode=20210524_PB_5AU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDIwY2Y1MC1hMWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zuK_hyl6pMu45QuKM5B4aK6NSak-5naarLLMD6JlazQ=)

| | Derek,

Three things defined Glenn Youngkin’s primary win in the Republican Governor’s race:
* He spent MILLIONS of his own money to buy the nomination.
* He made Donald Trump’s big lie about a stolen election the center of his primary campaign. He even pushed the QAnon conspiracy theory about Dominion voting machines.
* He campaigned across Virginia arm-and-arm with disgraced Texas Senator Ted Cruz.

No wonder Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin so quickly. Glenn is running a campaign right out of his playbook.

Derek, we’ve already seen the destruction that happens when an inexperienced, wealthy, extremist is put in power. We can’t let it happen again.

[**Will you donate and help Terry stop Glenn Youngkin from bringing Trumpism to the Governor’s office? We worked too hard to defeat Donald Trump to let his hand-picked candidate win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29670872/287134319/-2023814932?refcode=20210524_PB_5AU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDIwY2Y1MC1hMWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zuK_hyl6pMu45QuKM5B4aK6NSak-5naarLLMD6JlazQ=)

Now that he’s the nominee, Glenn is promising to spend a record-breaking $75 million to buy the Governor’s office.

He’s going on Fox News with right-wing radicals like Tucker Carlson and Laura Ingraham.

And he’s attacking Terry every step of the way, smearing him and Democrats with the same hateful garbage that Donald Trump used to divide our country for four exhausting years.

I don’t have to tell you how important it is for us to stop Glenn from taking us back. But Derek, I’m afraid that’s exactly what’s going to happen if Virginia Democrats don’t rally behind Terry right now.

[**Please. Contribute anything you can right now — it’s hard to overstate how much is riding on us defeating Glenn Youngkin this November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29670873/287134330/-2023814932?refcode=20210524_PB_5AU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDIwY2Y1MC1hMWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zuK_hyl6pMu45QuKM5B4aK6NSak-5naarLLMD6JlazQ=)

Thanks,

clean_body: And now it's Glenn Youngkin's. | | | = | | Derek, Three things defined Glenn Youngkin’s primary win in the Republican Governor’s race: He spent MILLIONS of his own money to buy the nomination. He made Donald Trump’s big lie about a stolen election the center of his primary campaign. He even pushed the QAnon conspiracy theory about Dominion voting machines. * He campaigned across Virginia arm-and-arm with disgraced Texas Senator Ted Cruz. No wonder Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin so quickly. Glenn is running a campaign right out of his playbook. Derek, we’ve already seen the destruction that happens when an inexperienced, wealthy, extremist is put in power. We can’t let it happen again. = Now that he’s the nominee, Glenn is promising to spend a record-breaking $75 million to buy the Governor’s office. He’s going on Fox News with right-wing radicals like Tucker Carlson and Laura Ingraham. And he’s attacking Terry every step of the way, smearing him and Democrats with the same hateful garbage that Donald Trump used to divide our country for four exhausting years. I don’t have to tell you how important it is for us to stop Glenn from taking us back. But Derek, I’m afraid that’s exactly what’s going to happen if Virginia Democrats don’t rally behind Terry right now. = Thanks, Paul Begala | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Sincerely asking you to contribute $3 today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Every donation sends an important message about the grassroots movement that we're building together.
#

Hi team,
One week from today we face an important end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I'd like to ask if you can chip in to help reach our goal. But first, I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why your contribution today is so important to our campaign.
Pennsylvania is ready for a Senator who understands in their bones what it looks like when our government fails the working class of this country. Whether we're talking about housing, infrastructure, or the climate crisis, the time is long overdue for our government to step up to the plate and address the needs of working people.
The U.S. Senate needs more members who actually:
* went to an underfunded school
* stood in line at a food bank
* have been unjustly stopped by police
* suffer with student debt
* have gone without healthcare

Working people don’t need more spokespersons, we need to be in the room. Period.
I'm running for U.S. Senate because our government has not worked for working people. It's time for that to change, but it's going to require all of us coming together in order to make it happen.
Every donation made before this end-of-month deadline not only sends an important message about the grassroots movement we're building together. It also ensures we'll have the resources to win this race, which is why I'm asking you directly:
[If you're able, can you please contribute $3 before our May monthly fundraising deadline? Any amount you can give will mean a lot to the success of our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29675705/287147273/-347207331?refcode2=d7138ad0-a9bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210524-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzEzOGFkMC1hOWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87mp-dXViB-1txRrw0InmWYOPzfb56VggpGk3tbV4DM=)
Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign. It means the world to know we're in this together.
Malcolm

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Expelled: Third times a charm?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Dear Peter,
They couldn't get me the first time. Or the
second time.
But now they're hoping the third times a
charm.
Over the weekend, Socialist Democrats cranked
up their calls to KICK ME OUT of Congress.
CNN, MSNBC, PBS, ABC, NBC, CBS … they
went on all the channels demanding I be removed from Congress
because I dare to tell the truth about their Socialist schemes.
What's worse, the powerful Chairman of the
Rules Committee in the House, Jim McGovern, has now joined in on
the chorus.
This is an important development, because
McGovern is the gatekeeper on the House floor and he decides
which bill comes up for a vote.
If he wants to bring a bill to the floor to
kick me out of Congress, he'll have the backing of Nancy Pelosi,
the Jihad Squad, and every Democrat in the House.
That's why I need your help to survive this
battle for a third time in just the last three months.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Will please help fill my "Stand with MTG" war
chest with a generous contribution of $25 so that the
Democrats will think twice before trying to kick me out?
You see, money talks in Washington, DC.
If they think I'm weak and don't have the
dollars to battle with them, they'll run me out.
But if they know I have the financial support
of the PEOPLE, they know no matter what they do, the voters will
be with me.
I'm enemy #1 of the Democrats and the Fake
News Media.
Please STAND WITH ME by making a generous
contribution to help me FIGHT BACK and WIN today!
For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene

fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for

Hello team, Coming out of the state legislative session, we’re seeing a direct attack on the people of Texas and everything we stand for. In fact, this has been the worst legislative session in memory. Led by Texas GOP Chair and secessionist Allen West, politicians like Dan Patrick continue to push their far-right agenda behind closed doors, including permitless carry, voter suppression measures, and anti-trans bathroom bills. clean_body: | Hello team, Coming out of the state legislative session, we’re seeing a direct attack on the people of Texas and everything we stand for. In fact, this has been the worst legislative session in memory. Led by Texas GOP Chair and secessionist Allen West, politicians like Dan Patrick continue to push their far-right agenda behind closed doors, including permitless carry, voter suppression measures, and anti-trans bathroom bills. All while still peddling the Big Lie and taking our democracy down with it. Now more than ever, we're going to have to fight for our democracy with everything we've got. Thousands of Texans are speaking out against their anti-democratic, unconstitutional bills. That’s why Mike is building a grassroots movement from the bottom up to bring people together — but we cannot win this fight without you. Texans deserve a leader who will fight for meaningful change, not out-of-touch politicians who hold us back. Pitch in any amount today to help us keep building our people-powered movement: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together, we can elect a real patriot who represents our Texas values, and restore compassion to the office. ---|---
Hi Peter-
Our country needs fixing.
And I don’t mean a surface level, patch job fix. We need a huge investment into our country — our infrastructure and workforce — to fix and rebuild America.
And that’s what Biden’s American Jobs Plan will do.
**The American Jobs Plan will change the very foundation of our nation — investing $2 trillion to build back better.**
The plan will create jobs to modernize and refurbish our transportation infrastructure — as well as replacing lead pipes, ensuring clean drinking water, and providing broadband access to all Americans. In total, **Biden’s American Jobs Plan would create 19 million jobs.** And to top it all off, this plan prioritizes funding clean energy projects to fight back against climate change.
**[Tell me, do you support Joe Biden’s American Jobs Plan? Take our 10-second poll now>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29678313/287158215/643775108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5NmQ2ZTdkLWIxYmMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xpU-cZS9dH8kENLdu-XnVgvUd-FehZZz0A-YX-tUUok=&emci=aef5140d-14b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=596d6e7d-b1bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)**
Voters across the country overwhelmingly support Biden’s American Jobs Plan, with polls showing that 68% of Americans support the plan.
It’s clear that this is legislation that Americans — Republicans and Democrats alike — want and need.
**[But I want to hear from you: do you support Joe Biden’s American Jobs Plan?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29678318/287158220/643775108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5NmQ2ZTdkLWIxYmMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xpU-cZS9dH8kENLdu-XnVgvUd-FehZZz0A-YX-tUUok=&emci=aef5140d-14b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=596d6e7d-b1bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)**
Thanks for your input!
Julianna

Voters across the country overwhelmingly support Biden’s American Jobs Plan, with polls showing that 68% of Americans support the plan. It’s clear that this is legislation that Americans — Republicans and Democrats alike — want and need. Thanks for your input! Julianna Unite the Country Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment. Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. = = =** Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | Hoosier Republican,

_**Thanks to our Republican leadership in Indiana, we’re setting the example for the nation**_.

While other states are still struggling to come out of the downturn caused by the pandemic, Hoosiers are _thriving_.

We’ve kept our books balanced, invested in key areas that will impact Indiana’s future, and funded our priorities like paying off debt.

And we keep seeing results, including major job commitments from Apple, Toyota, and Amazon!

**Governor Holcomb and our Republican leaders accomplished this by putting people over politics and keeping taxes low to get people back to work and get our economy rolling again**.

Of course, the left isn’t happy with this. They are raising money hand over fist to try and bring a blue wave to Indiana and we need every single Hoosier on board to fight back.

We’re launching our end-of-May fundraising drive today, to keep our foot on the gas and keep delivering for Hoosiers!

Can you chip in $10 right now to help us fight the radical left and make sure that Indiana continues to set the example for the rest of America?

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, MAY 24, 2021
ICYMI: FULTON COUNTY ABSENTEE BALLOTS TO BE UNSEALED AND EXAMINED
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, on Friday, Superior Court Judge Brian Amero ruled that absentee ballots in Fulton County from the November 2020 election may be unsealed and examined for possible fraud. Greater Georgia has [supported](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-prfo9jcY8OX9eNiu8D2qmVY1REgJOIh_67GlJdgetv9Tl9eSxdYbOttHD5cUVsKF9rHtbbrnjIfXuD87NrSEaFx-uIQaCBZErs7Q3A1PqCApM3PEV0BUpRQh3FAsZaIqhy1vCT-s55aRc7Tcw0kahmZKhQgfak59P8IyS71hUKqOHVbvib5emdvHmB2ziBERj1QLfdQRQjSwELUl3528zHcKRODoOpxcWoBm21LYSWWhKCwdwO69g==&c=BGsHHF3jkUZiDcKGvsovLsOCrkwn6tdrDXDW_jFRX-DfG-G5TJ-SgQ==&ch=DRoUgC-s3hsVk1RAm7wVoqmBTzjsDDML-H_FQLaayRyZ9-0xSgxkkQ==&jrc=1) this inspection from the beginning and [looks forward](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-prfo9jcY8OX9eNiu8D2qmVY1REgJOIh_67GlJdgetv9Tl9eSxdYbC907ynvxV4s1quFxZUUCyYUR_ZO86sZf6xJKQpji-wqKEXF0j0gAIHZ9smYJMpi3jv5JQXtiC69FlcjcQAcZ5QBcJoS145utDtcXh-QGdHcGY5NzVv84QXynGSTVhd0AZmRBgu5StB2AvzpxEtnXARqWLHHpZm0RqNClPeGX5R-_XZ6kiC8aTsZvZy_yhaXrec2uEU_KVlM&c=BGsHHF3jkUZiDcKGvsovLsOCrkwn6tdrDXDW_jFRX-DfG-G5TJ-SgQ==&ch=DRoUgC-s3hsVk1RAm7wVoqmBTzjsDDML-H_FQLaayRyZ9-0xSgxkkQ==&jrc=1) to its findings. In fact, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler praised the ruling as "a helpful step in restoring transparency, accountability, and voter confidence." clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, MAY 24, 2021 ICYMI: FULTON COUNTY ABSENTEE BALLOTS TO BE UNSEALED AND EXAMINED ATLANTA - In case you missed it, on Friday, Superior Court Judge Brian Amero ruled that absentee ballots in Fulton County from the November 2020 election may be unsealed and examined for possible fraud. Greater Georgia has this inspection from the beginning and to its findings. In fact, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler praised the ruling as "a helpful step in restoring transparency, accountability, and voter confidence." See below for media coverage on the Fulton County decision and Greater Georgia's statement that you might have missed: - Judge allows Fulton County absentee ballots to be unsealed for fraud examination - BREAKING: Georgia Judge Approves Audit Of 145,000 Absentee Ballots In Fulton County - Court orders audit of Fulton County absentee ballots from 2020 election - Judge agrees to unseal 2020 ballots in Georgia county for audit - Judge rules absentee ballots from Fulton County can be unsealed for fraud examination - Another ballot audit set to move ahead in Fulton County, Georgia, as judge rules absentee ballots can be unsealed - Georgia Judge Unseals More Than 145,000 Absentee Ballots For 2020 Election Fraud Investigation - Georgia Judge Orders Audit of 147K Fulton County Absentee Ballots - Georgia 2020 Election Absentee Ballots Can Be Unsealed And Examined For Fraud, Judge Says - Breaking: Georgia Judge Approves Absentee Ballot Audit for 2020 Election in Fulton County - Georgia headed toward yet another presidential election review - Judge Orders Audit of 145,000 Absentee Ballots in Fulton County, Georgia * - BREAKING: Georgia Judge Approves Audit Of Fulton County Absentee Ballots | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. we're in for an uphill battle
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29679032/287160650/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk87-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM2MjkyZS1iMmJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DIP39IaJ8duS-4H6M4mvZqF89IzEwyJzdN9Q-Pewgc=)

I won't sugarcoat this, friend: Flipping Arizona blue was already going to be an uphill battle. But this news just made the climb even steeper.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight just rated our race for governor a "toss-up" – meaning this will be one of the tightest races in the country. And the GOP is already mobilizing to defeat us. **
Republican extremists like Kelli Ward and failed politicians like Doug Ducey spent the past year denying the dangers of the pandemic, spreading lies and conspiracy theories about the 2020 election and attacking our constitutional right to vote.

And now, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans are getting ready to spend BIG to keep this seat red so they can continue to divide us and push their extremist agenda instead of solving the challenges facing working people.
Enough is enough, friend. I know we can restore the promise of Arizona, transform our broken education system and build an economy that works for _all _our people, not just a lucky few.

**I'm not intimidated by the GOP's millions or the attack ads they're sure to run. Because I know that if this team comes together and fights as hard as we can, our movement will be stronger than anything they can throw at us.**
But we still do have to fight – _hard_ – to flip this battleground state for the sake of all Arizonans' futures. **The only way we can stay on track and win this race is if we raise another $1,462 by midnight. But right now, we're falling short. **
**[I need you to step up right now and power this movement to defeat GOP extremism and restore the promise of Arizona. Please, will you rush $5 or more now to help us win this race and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29679033/287160651/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk87-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM2MjkyZS1iMmJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DIP39IaJ8duS-4H6M4mvZqF89IzEwyJzdN9Q-Pewgc=)**

Although this is welcome news, we mustn’t become complacent. So many families, businesses, and working people in Virginia have not recovered from the financial damage inflicted upon them by the pandemic -- and we cannot forget them. I am a proud immigrant and conservative woman. **This is what the Left hates about me: I go against everything they think I should be.**

I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the U.S. when I was a young woman with my single mother. We started a business and embodied the American Dream. We worked hard to make ends meet, and when we were faced with an unfair tax bill, we were nearly ruined because we lacked the resources to fight it.

Since then I have worked to become California's taxpayer champion. clean_body: The Democrats have tried for months to smear my name and spread lies about me. ** . == Friend, The Democrats have tried for months to smear my name and spread lies about me. They've even gone so far as to name my district as one of their top targets to FLIP in 2022. Why?Because they don 't like my story and they don't like what I represent. I am a proud immigrant and conservative woman. This is what the Left hates about me: I go against everything they think I should be. I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the U.S. when I was a young woman with my single mother. We started a business and embodied the American Dream. We worked hard to make ends meet, and when we were faced with an unfair tax bill, we were nearly ruined because we lacked the resources to fight it. Since then I have worked to become California's taxpayer champion. I have returned over $400 million to California families and I will continue to fight for every taxpayer now that I am in Congress. But Pelosi and the Far Left will do everything they can to stop me which is why I need your help. == == == | == == ==** Your support goes a long way to help stand up to the Far Left's dark money. They dumped millions into my race last year and have already begun spending to try to silence my voice in Congress. If I'm going to help fight for taxpayers and stop the Democrats' reckless spending, I need your help. == Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

states!

One of America's top pollsters just dropped a bombshell report:

Republicans and Democrats are STATISTICALLY TIED in battleground
states!

This is extremely urgent. The most competitive races in America
-- the ones that could tip the entire election -- are
NECK-AND-NECK and could go either way.

(https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/republican-victory-donor-file/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20210523_SM-CZ.101461_steve-scalise_t1065461-1756&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210523_were-tied)

When elections are this close, every last dollar can make the
difference between victory and defeat.

What you do next is very important.

the top in battleground races... but the stakes are too high to
leave it up to chance. That's why I'm personally asking you to

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
The Democrats have tried for months to smear my name and spread lies about me.
****

.

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y1Hr-j-gzRT7iv9nLP2Y46aMnIeuXmuRMvNou-8Yx7AqSIb2n-n60Is73hO79U5NNVJJJyuuvbkgA5URkVTpcXkUe_7tPfKL9rcZ9_AQoHEsfWRiEQ8PXuooC6q-c4qd4x23_B4wO6r3QPA37oAt7p9F91jZJoDndvS29LvE5b_d4MZDL8ZQm-7Fg385yR7r-wUucVKXosrw-75RL5qWrpvAoyuZ0PvHu4hbjuQnfRMHRMKzVPgbKTqORikvwc590VgRMQ8qO0IRvbeUPU3xcse9ycWnYs0khEwAycRf3QVzuud3ERzlXhVX7Qt07xE8qozTmVpSoGOC7FMxH5qbxtT4d8sjhit1O-pxJTO-G7CeEiV0PS1Sdpju0mVF_J62bDNT_VtAaeFQxafTvcn1kDP4nDPMQ63yL_mJg_HWRCEtNY3-TQSj_XzZCUNf9oc9JHPvvoxRfVY=&c=h-nVU0HyYMWSjWOj1c_FsxB3HWA_BaaNxQcPAMM2g_5ahM0PW2L-dA==&ch=r-3Q9DKODweoJjYtJAUgFDccYwelEuPInAOkj9a0KbkYZn8qQiBLGQ==)
Friend,

The Democrats have tried for months to smear my name and spread lies about me. They've even gone so far as to name my district as one of their top targets to FLIP in 2022. Why?_Because they don 't like my story and they don't like what I represent._

I am a proud immigrant and conservative woman. **This is what the Left hates about me: I go against everything they think I should be.**

I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the U.S. when I was a young woman with my single mother. We started a business and embodied the American Dream. We worked hard to make ends meet, and when we were faced with an unfair tax bill, we were nearly ruined because we lacked the resources to fight it.

Since then I have worked to become California's taxpayer champion. I have returned over $400 million to California families and I will continue to fight for every taxpayer now that I am in Congress. **But Pelosi and the Far Left will do everything they can to stop me which is why I need your help.**

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: NH GOP
subject: Your Donations make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
With your help, we've retaken the State House, State Senate, Executive Council, and won a special election

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/1/010001799ebbd343-1da93de2-46db-4e26-8616-7817ae247923-000000/2XfhzuCaCzipxXNNYoOdSgYRJBM=215)
---
| | Derek,

With your help, we've made incredible strides. In 2020, we won back the State House of Representatives, State Senate, and Executive Council. Just last month, we won a special election in Merrimack.

These accomplishments have only been possible through the generosity of our donors.

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/2/010001799ebbd343-1da93de2-46db-4e26-8616-7817ae247923-000000/wPMWOq9NjH4PLC9wDe8wgQL-Dag=215)
---
| Now we need your help again.

The 2022 elections are approaching quickly, and _we have another special election coming up_.

All the progress we've made could be gone in an instant. We cannot give the Democrats an opportunity to dictate policy in Concord. Last time they held power, they pushed an income tax, sales tax, and anti-constitutional gun policies. _Now their agenda is even more extreme_.

We need your help to solidify our advantage in Concord, and make sure that we maintain the New Hampshire Advantage.

With your help, we can make even more progress.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Sean Parnell
subject: I wanted to give you a quick recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Americans for Parnell Committee
body:
I wanted to take a step back and fill you in on what's happened since my launch, less than two weeks ago.

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g9qJgREIpEhvaM6xXfON1k2scZyStZgWsk3_S_4hvZCiAU3-RL5wvV8sWzbn9pIDgtHzFTiFBXX-iZ39IEfbUfaG9oMzDYXmPR7sMDMksQQ0pNFlkJCFAytIJ4dyyXXT_eXj_c2QW-BWR91EupKiv93n6YA9g7eTjRb3mtbAAlIEv0UVF8QyVkUC1ftHh0HFVoboObH-FLseSjUvS7K051rPS49_pwgLKVaCh8T9chebHxPUmTQPiWjJayq8e-h310Kw-7Sa3e-SSaFapUuPOTdjUuQMRYUJf5W8Tz2xUKMngy8YmgQ1ff6WDP-_6aKIUR92Co0PhwZHHOOmQou-V1truEgRNqnrHzMQiBobARYZSuYQdZTHmxhNoJR7npo5RRpqpVv7EfpZ9VOr7tVkAsz6gzq0LqkXhwaotoMT6xrqea7auIxkJ_6CAO8K0wn6Ep6f9X5lAuyPgQ0IHkJXmQ==&c=GuatvkC9PiRAJquxRDdVZjXqrcnXAVh9tNUEUrQFY4Z6IOSQdYc5Zg==&ch=LnxUdO2P6BU4ZRkHiprx9AxdweQnaDysvOR_WMoOt2bDxd3Q-Ghzwg==) Friend, I wanted to take a step back and fill you in on what's happened since my launch, less than two weeks ago.

First, Chuck Schumer immediately started spending crazy amounts of money in attack ads against me. Yikes!

Then, a liberal veteran's group came out and called me a 'traitor,' in a low attempt to disgrace me and the Purple Heart and two Bronze Stars on my chest. Gross!

And most recently, we hit our biggest fundraising goal of the campaign and I only have YOU to thank for it. Nice!

**But Friend, we CANNOT back down now.** Now that the Left knows I'm serious about turning Pennsylvania RED and have grassroots patriots like you on my side, they're going to flood in even more money against me.

[**Can I count on your support today to combat this influx of left wing dark-money?**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g9qJgREIpEhvaM6xXfON1k2scZyStZgWsk3_S_4hvZCiAU3-RL5wvV8sWzbn9pIDgtHzFTiFBXX-iZ39IEfbUfaG9oMzDYXmPR7sMDMksQQ0pNFlkJCFAytIJ4dyyXXT_eXj_c2QW-BWR91EupKiv93n6YA9g7eTjRb3mtbAAlIEv0UVF8QyVkUC1ftHh0HFVoboObH-FLseSjUvS7K051rPS49_pwgLKVaCh8T9chebHxPUmTQPiWjJayq8e-h310Kw-7Sa3e-SSaFapUuPOTdjUuQMRYUJf5W8Tz2xUKMngy8YmgQ1ff6WDP-_6aKIUR92Co0PhwZHHOOmQou-V1truEgRNqnrHzMQiBobARYZSuYQdZTHmxhNoJR7npo5RRpqpVv7EfpZ9VOr7tVkAsz6gzq0LqkXhwaotoMT6xrqea7auIxkJ_6CAO8K0wn6Ep6f9X5lAuyPgQ0IHkJXmQ==&c=GuatvkC9PiRAJquxRDdVZjXqrcnXAVh9tNUEUrQFY4Z6IOSQdYc5Zg==&ch=LnxUdO2P6BU4ZRkHiprx9AxdweQnaDysvOR_WMoOt2bDxd3Q-Ghzwg==) | [FIGHT BACK TODAY - DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g9qJgREIpEhvaM6xXfON1k2scZyStZgWsk3_S_4hvZCiAU3-RL5wvV8sWzbn9pIDgtHzFTiFBXX-iZ39IEfbUfaG9oMzDYXmPR7sMDMksQQ0pNFlkJCFAytIJ4dyyXXT_eXj_c2QW-BWR91EupKiv93n6YA9g7eTjRb3mtbAAlIEv0UVF8QyVkUC1ftHh0HFVoboObH-FLseSjUvS7K051rPS49_pwgLKVaCh8T9chebHxPUmTQPiWjJayq8e-h310Kw-7Sa3e-SSaFapUuPOTdjUuQMRYUJf5W8Tz2xUKMngy8YmgQ1ff6WDP-_6aKIUR92Co0PhwZHHOOmQou-V1truEgRNqnrHzMQiBobARYZSuYQdZTHmxhNoJR7npo5RRpqpVv7EfpZ9VOr7tVkAsz6gzq0LqkXhwaotoMT6xrqea7auIxkJ_6CAO8K0wn6Ep6f9X5lAuyPgQ0IHkJXmQ==&c=GuatvkC9PiRAJquxRDdVZjXqrcnXAVh9tNUEUrQFY4Z6IOSQdYc5Zg==&ch=LnxUdO2P6BU4ZRkHiprx9AxdweQnaDysvOR_WMoOt2bDxd3Q-Ghzwg==)
---

I couldn't have asked for a better platoon to go into this fight alongside. With patriots like you on my side, we will be victorious! Thank you for your unwavering support, and I look forward to continuing this fight with you by my side.

Sean

Then, a liberal veteran's group came out and called me a 'traitor,' in a low attempt to disgrace me and the Purple Heart and two Bronze Stars on my chest. Gross!

And most recently, we hit our biggest fundraising goal of the campaign and I only have YOU to thank for it. Nice!

**But Friend, we CANNOT back down now.** Now that the Left knows I'm serious about turning Pennsylvania RED and have grassroots patriots like you on my side, they're going to flood in even more money against me.

[**Can I count on your support today to combat this influx of left wing dark-money?**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010u_oVGVV3cAs6eJiE0ENzYU935usm5V_NacCiWHHaYlmrSubpc_ZqAhkx8hm_xUk6J5VP2uQsIoYWPzvpXlLsicrAIlS0MgBWVX_4d1DbR1nH3_MJOWPFhwoRkg_E-NlG2va2fjquzj2w_N8X9FHFF2ODI8AP16LV3FV0yZcAVKuXDsZOo7XcPV31MUmsKs6xdIbw2c7LzB6vcVJhlqVgjlRkPcaosqyaBGumMAUiiQoqvLhRbsOdYJoy2rzd9I7-JSVi3tXO68tESJiD04EiEaZE3FN2yFCuuhvh_4HWTTukrShcNbiH7qIYlYWnHh8J5BJDZUhvNerHMM3-Z08Z-U-cNt74M-BSsnkMEnQVijYymhhd-A82U0snD1ql0mhgJ7o8XntDF1GvPR6OSQlnc1_daD-2eqXR2crjfjtG_l6KiypmErX3V7Cyj9a1TFeZ4xLnVF7uW0qJc0um4B0Lg==&c=6OsdQmolKAfOZi5NwjPojrteEWfdzf7RgqeWsT4u7FIuGkh5DK4-Ng==&ch=IIoiDYb3Zih_YBXTdfXnzuezyBD1sqTEQcohTDON6XpORY2JzZ0E4Q==) | [FIGHT BACK TODAY - DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010u_oVGVV3cAs6eJiE0ENzYU935usm5V_NacCiWHHaYlmrSubpc_ZqAhkx8hm_xUk6J5VP2uQsIoYWPzvpXlLsicrAIlS0MgBWVX_4d1DbR1nH3_MJOWPFhwoRkg_E-NlG2va2fjquzj2w_N8X9FHFF2ODI8AP16LV3FV0yZcAVKuXDsZOo7XcPV31MUmsKs6xdIbw2c7LzB6vcVJhlqVgjlRkPcaosqyaBGumMAUiiQoqvLhRbsOdYJoy2rzd9I7-JSVi3tXO68tESJiD04EiEaZE3FN2yFCuuhvh_4HWTTukrShcNbiH7qIYlYWnHh8J5BJDZUhvNerHMM3-Z08Z-U-cNt74M-BSsnkMEnQVijYymhhd-A82U0snD1ql0mhgJ7o8XntDF1GvPR6OSQlnc1_daD-2eqXR2crjfjtG_l6KiypmErX3V7Cyj9a1TFeZ4xLnVF7uW0qJc0um4B0Lg==&c=6OsdQmolKAfOZi5NwjPojrteEWfdzf7RgqeWsT4u7FIuGkh5DK4-Ng==&ch=IIoiDYb3Zih_YBXTdfXnzuezyBD1sqTEQcohTDON6XpORY2JzZ0E4Q==)

This week, I visited the southern border and witnessed firsthand the impacts of Joe Biden's radical open borders agenda. **One thing was abundantly clear as I saw countless illegal immigrants cross the border: we must finish building the wall. **

**Take a moment to watch my reaction from the border: **

name: Todd Young
subject: My trip to the border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
This week, I visited the southern border and witnessed firsthand the impacts of Joe Biden's radical open borders agenda.
This week, I visited the southern border and witnessed firsthand the impacts of Joe Biden's radical open borders agenda. **One thing was abundantly clear as I saw countless illegal immigrants cross the border: we must finish building the wall. **

**Take a moment to watch my reaction from the border: **
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGqy-jn6VQXtCkhyzRCw2RWWaBLfwTtLUuP9NhD8PtXgfZ9D_zUiVF1_ng4nj11sgYlY3mOra843LYekCt7sbZczXLKU1PKPt6e-Lsmsl-2_v4bV7FF68Eh9d6uE9yXLaP7dQ6EUm2Y64pZqP9BA74dnFi40MlbaHA_-f9uhJqjb9DGXZStv4D-G9dPIZ9QD0_5Ie2EPCWQtnl3R_wyNCVFsJsHdMvi6LSR0-yXBuhv6npYUuP0zjY0iO7f4f7BjvkVkib9P35pYCC9Fr5mx_b9xNOMpFCGsdYGKq9YfI9S7khfGXihBnsvZTjnkas0FMrmhw-ndeiMQNO7eUJezhCKUyNXh65mAVK-SSB-IL35u_umpilwA-BbaJkxfBtYGsNzu8xLbqzYk1mmMOY21E0aNbAK-p8ri90JiIINal-d4r-rx6oyHJY9q_ESgM1bO9ci9Lv9oNyK-yGstB-MutyPftNUi_GmP&c=64rTIw7hAWpvwgNmlqDg9PTnfC0wSPiLV0jReDr4HWtnPCoI9bJYAA==&ch=Dplep2rZHAM_RLKW3WTv7Y6qmLpbE22e2kriecbjI9KfrJlQctEpDA==)

The Biden Border Crisis has led to record illegal immigration and an unmanageable situation for our brave border patrol officers.

Today, the crisis continues to rage but Democrats are pretending that it doesn't exist. **We can 't let them whitewash their disastrous open borders agenda. **

********
[**WATCH MY REACTION FROM THE BORDER ->**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGqy-jn6VQXtCkhyzRCw2RWWaBLfwTtLUuP9NhD8PtXgfZ9D_zUiVF1_ng4nj11sgYlY3mOra843LYekCt7sbZczXLKU1PKPt6e-Lsmsl-2_v4bV7FF68Eh9d6uE9yXLaP7dQ6EUm2Y64pZqP9BA74dnFi40MlbaHA_-f9uhJqjb9DGXZStv4D-G9dPIZ9QD0_5Ie2EPCWQtnl3R_wyNCVFsJsHdMvi6LSR0-yXBuhv6npYUuP0zjY0iO7f4f7BjvkVkib9P35pYCC9Fr5mx_b9xNOMpFCGsdYGKq9YfI9S7khfGXihBnsvZTjnkas0FMrmhw-ndeiMQNO7eUJezhCKUyNXh65mAVK-SSB-IL35u_umpilwA-BbaJkxfBtYGsNzu8xLbqzYk1mmMOY21E0aNbAK-p8ri90JiIINal-d4r-rx6oyHJY9q_ESgM1bO9ci9Lv9oNyK-yGstB-MutyPftNUi_GmP&c=64rTIw7hAWpvwgNmlqDg9PTnfC0wSPiLV0jReDr4HWtnPCoI9bJYAA==&ch=Dplep2rZHAM_RLKW3WTv7Y6qmLpbE22e2kriecbjI9KfrJlQctEpDA==)

Peter, I’m not your typical politician. I’m the daughter of an immigrant, a single mother of two who survived on Medicaid and earned my college degree online while working a full-time job. I’m not running for money or fame or power. **I’m running for Lt. Governor because I know my story is not unique. We need a leader who looks like the people of Virginia, and one who will fight for them too.** For too long, our government hasn’t worked for working families like mine. It’s allowed the rich to get richer while those below the poverty line stay there. It’s permitted dangerous leaders like Donald Trump to fan the flames of white supremacy and racism. And it’s kept too many Americans from having a seat at the table. Well, I’ve had enough. I’m pulling my chair up to this table and demanding a system that works for all Virginians — and I’m asking you to join me. **So if you can, will you chip in $10, or any amount, to our campaign for Lt. Governor today? clean_body: | Peter, I’m not your typical politician. I’m the daughter of an immigrant, a single mother of two who survived on Medicaid and earned my college degree online while working a full-time job. I’m not running for money or fame or power. I’m running for Lt. Governor because I know my story is not unique. We need a leader who looks like the people of Virginia, and one who will fight for them too. For too long, our government hasn’t worked for working families like mine. It’s allowed the rich to get richer while those below the poverty line stay there. It’s permitted dangerous leaders like Donald Trump to fan the flames of white supremacy and racism. And it’s kept too many Americans from having a seat at the table. Well, I’ve had enough. I’m pulling my chair up to this table and demanding a system that works for all Virginians — and I’m asking you to join me. So if you can, will you chip in $10, or any amount, to our campaign for Lt. Governor today? With Election Day quickly approaching, your support is more important than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I can’t thank you enough for standing by me. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. | Fellow Conservative,
My name is Catalina Lauf.
And I’m reaching out today to tell you about my congressional campaign to defeat **_Trump-bashing, "Republican in Name Only" Adam Kinzinger_**.
[**That’s why I’m urging you to support my America First campaign with a generous gift of any amount that’ll fund my fight to expel this big-spending, gun-grabbing Swamp Creature from Congress!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9hSsStOAKZVDug766eIA5hHe6ta7tq5Rnm2FMwykfIwWjFwBUOBZXJflodZlPgLMYw-ox1Y4PhfggkvuelAG60ukqNfQI_Kv5uQYDBW456FcBEEV0JW7KIEA3w7oa6fDYXMen4lbDbyB0wHTWY0TiQMNyziGqoASlZre_OnpPPxdNe_6gmu6UdRGRuKpifcI3nsOTpnT6gz3vZXFVAXm57HLYWs58gFLAjM1GWMu5_JLw%3D%3D)
**Did you know Adam Kinzinger was 1 of only 10 disgraceful House Republicans to vote with Nancy Pelosi to impeach President Trump!**
As a conservative warrior who recently served as an appointed official in President Donald Trump’s administration, I’m fighting to STOP Kinzinger from dismantling our Make America Great Again movement.
[So, I hope you’ll take a minute or two now to join my fast-growing grassroots army of patriots from across the country by making your best gift of support!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9hSsStOAKZVDug766eIA5hH1hEGOKwiK2Pk1WoZ7x_DDSQVoHlFVwOGqCgLjoG1Of99_xJRDHMoIMH6FRVP8Nnalf1ME-8J76HBIUY6g-6SRduMavPZ4LgRMFkrGfrs_pREZJ1lF1ZI_M34Qiov5Uj1KoESkiajbhVdDGweKzskjtb2kq2PnDPBlaG37KpK8pVI4LQGiUTULdWjSzjVKpRpy3eo4ZrAJtnBsSXEdfigWg%3D%3D)
But I can’t emphasize this enough: **I WILL NOT SUCCEED without a massive army of grassroots conservatives standing by my side.**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9hSsStOAKZVDug766eIA5hH3fJJKYU8z7WXdSD0eHQ90xic3nouyMPRFtSVge4J4-lLbgU3GxIfA2-LXfiGJB6Pvp6XIGheAnY_XiraWIayCbcGTjmuqM6W9MaYARLjGCs60QVUBjtkVK_33__BqNsErIhXCQlWvdT1cmGcaBxC_YtpEgzhzYaM6Z2dvVGWGnu2g4Spw_GFoy3EE3XByXGzLnGP8Ci3z3CY6AJ8m3T9bQ%3D%3D) **_As I frequently tell the voters I meet, I’m the anti-AOC._**
You see, as the daughter of a Guatemalan immigrant, I’m proud of my Hispanic heritage. But I also LOVE everything America stands for as the land of liberty!
I don’t know why fellow Hispanics like AOC join the blame-America Left or complain about being “** _victims_** ” of “** _White Privilege_** ” and “** _White Supremacy_**."
But my refusal to consider myself a victim is probably why I’m a successful, 28-year-old small business owner and a former Trump Administration official...
**...NOT a whiney, narcistic, economically illiterate dope!**
More than anything, I want you to know that I’ll fearlessly fight for you to:

* **Stop Big Tech’s un-American war on conservatives** focused on censoring, shadow banning, and silencing our voices;

* **Defend, with every ounce of my being, free and fair elections in America** from the Left’s plot to massively expand voter fraud; AND

* **Restore prosperity to Americans** before the deranged Dems irreversibly destroy our nation’s economy, replacing our free enterprise system with AOC’s ruinous, soul-crushing socialist agenda!

**[That’s why, with the future of American liberty hanging in the balance, I’m asking you to support my campaign with a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9hSsStOAKZVDug766eIA5hHbWCtli6xhjg-q3K5IDuBD9DSOCkCh-ah3tepaetZawJEjHCnfEue_0lrxc9sWuEWMWz7oC0B_hjeJ189OPSGnNNEjatXFD2pxi5em-Amls-bAk1vXO5j7ppR5ptdYfatYVrBSxEWPs3ZXOqEBmmroawCyBVzngPRkA5FS_x4c3C2KH9is0Af1pioy2QXW46BaLA7uu8Ybl_IVhzRdNlLMA%3D%3D)**| | | | [DONATE $25!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9jE9z7Tcz96LdctHfX5LAQ4afBh5Pq5_bAcp8QMl1WqYA7dOV_C9Ig0dRMB2urd3r4IIaOr2cE78SlBdBGt6eavBu7Y3EAPCdzFvypbhGGuAvEmbGNKzpXquJnAfeiTbxo_M-FF7IGyC7mMSqj3wZeRXRQrIGldEYf2Q15Ab7PzJGgEz3PvBu1yV-0XK--cybIFNywdlt7O60A170QHqnZwasVvF4jp1wesX48pAENBsg%3D%3D)

| I’ll be honest, I never thought I’d launch a primary challenge against an incumbent Republican.
But despite my reluctance, my decision to primary Never Trump Adam Kinzinger was not only easy, but absolutely necessary because of his shameful record of:
* **Embarrassing his conservative constituents** by voting with AOC and the far-Left to impeach President Trump!

* **Rejecting our core conservative values of individual liberty and limited government** by siding with Nancy Pelosi in 1 out of every 3 votes!

* **Voting for “Sleepy” Joe Biden’s never-ending onslaught** of liberty-killing bills that, piece-by-piece, erode America’s founding principles!

After 10 years in Congress, Adam is no longer trying to hide his true identity as a career politician and Swamp Creature. As the Left’s favorite Republican, he’s a frequent, beloved guest on CNN, MSNBC and other Fake News leftwing media!
Constitution-loving patriots like me and you can’t afford to allow Never Trump Adam Kinzinger to continue destroying our limited-government foundation.
**That’s why you and I MUST win this fight!**
It’s time to give Adam his gold watch, thank him for his “** _service_** ” and wish him luck in a well-deserved early retirement by kicking his RINO butt out of Congress!
**_But I can’t do this alone...[I NEED your help](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9hSsStOAKZVDug766eIA5hHfebr-k9mGXz-HGr8jTqa4ZDWdBCb5RxpCWb9T7wfsSt0VTZfujJL5eoCzU79oyUySkbSz1m70qfsqx6TXqsag8cJYw3zBXXpG46h7Txx3iyanrdzMhiu9BzZGzbZa-Kg-p6tBxcaLmUpPCqI7N46hqjvY08Cach10wllGV1y2bDF_jGZjHyHQwQqfDPSfhMCmfWu6p4-Kq-ojXKPQHU72A%3D%3D)._**
**[So, please stand with me and join my fast-growing grassroots army of patriots with a generous gift right now before you close this email.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9hSsStOAKZVDug766eIA5hHkd47uEWy0wTztdUlhlNPqm7r6KFD6PzKpq2HAnDQSTOpqUwA7o6KXoWM4j0MgswRPc-wOJwqg96VJFyG78Zhbr2R-vS0o--1PXvwlpwQ89wEkajk-H9tiNCXIqoLYUdVupwB89YtuWkKVHq4CKGiHCSAIk_b2HlxGMTNj8q6rkI7w8R9xLTwloSis3IV2srgPWizZvr1bNFl3SREhMfp0g%3D%3D)**| | | | [DONATE!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=caa66f3b6ea14640a007a53729641714&_e=-0rVoRgJWiNrG2jSlgQ3Rs73VjRANAVOeVot-MHFmKursu0EyTYHt1uZHwM-YBlVnXSfAmssNp72NDf94U2QeeBipF2dxUJM0IOfxcOKx9hSsStOAKZVDug766eIA5hHNUn-4Q9p5RoI6TYG4TemYVQ-kdmHOQ4p1-m-PovTgK7PhQjbEeO-g6LgvKI0lgg_YGlc94F9Lrl1kopjAmY3YilI-OQIyuTr3DfH0ra34-ocm_CDJpMWQ50hFPQO-2Rs7GmOTzTV6f82Ob72XkDjASeRlaFHgmMXx5VYOsBDBP-lTY8en6IfdG0onotIt-bdTvjAMaexNnlRxy8EnWYZAg%3D%3D)

Yours in the fight for liberty,

Catalina Lauf
Candidate for Congress

clean_body: If we don’t secure our elections, the Senate is lost. | Peter, If you think we’re going to flip Kamala’s Senate majority next year without first ensuring our elections are FREE and FAIR... then you’ve got another thing coming. The Left wants you to believe there was nothing to see in 2020. Lies! As I explained on Steve Bannon’s War Room,it’s simple math and evidence \-- and we cannot afford to enter next year’s midterms without a FULL FORENSIC AUDIT of the 2020 election in key battleground states. That’s why I’ve secured a MATCH on all contributions to help keep up the fight to secure our elections as we work tirelessly to win this open Senate seat. Liberals and the establishment RINOS who attack me want you to believe that securing our elections is for conspiracy theorists. But you tell me if basic statistics sound like a conspiracy theory... For the last 40 YEARS , the 19 bellwether counties across America have all voted for the winning presidential candidate -- except in 2020. Last year, Joe Biden won ONLY 1 of those counties. President Trump won 18 of 19 bellwether counties that have predicted the last 40 years of presidential elections, and yet the Left wants to call YOU crazy for even questioning their narrative. As a Navy SEAL who risked my life for this country, I cannot overstate just how much is on the line. The very fabric of our Republic is at stake if we don’t secure our elections ahead of the 2022 midterms. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: John Kasich
subject: It's working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
When I look at last Wednesday's vote in the U.S. House to create a non-political, bipartisan commission to study the Jan. 6th attack on the U.S. Capit [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=0c54fdc504024e81ae0cf060722b4dea&_e=0_bSRBqkiiKlTlNps92T_eF56JQV17EZh06qxDPak_Tt8l-j_0-yUJwpcv026I0xqseVOj-aRDFOuYO8LDKurlf74kHL07QYWLJJIYm67kbJQtyp6k2FOoF033DuTvNmspSMRAkgQeA66w4dLPQqBbbB4tT1vEkd5sk7gKJeKThUUUA36xHzunp_ny4TaCcLoLOaIAFwQYfroyCbgNylb3HREMVzW6Vx3v9G6adAI-Rh2nuBybsTwVFhSxCSwVm2lOl525dfXkrQQm1IX8ZWvQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter, you know, the interesting thing about courage is that it's contagious.

When I look at last Wednesday's vote in the U.S. House to create a non-political, bipartisan commission to study the Jan. 6th attack on the U.S. Capitol building, it boggles my mind that so many Republicans could vote against it.

**But what I want to draw your attention to is the 35 Republicans who defied orders from GOP leadership and voted for this commission**. First it was 10 who courageously stood up and voted for impeachment. Then it was more who voted to keep Rep. Liz Cheney in leadership. And now this.

You see, what's happening here is more and more members are remembering who they work for and they're voting their conscience to strengthen and heal America. They don't work for McCarthy and McConnell - they work for the American people who elected them.

**I spoke about this recently if you'd like to**[**watch a short clip here**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=0c54fdc504024e81ae0cf060722b4dea&_e=0_bSRBqkiiKlTlNps92T_bOYAH7BBYARGOS2T3oRpzkE4AE-X0p-IXOE0YnDN1kQwHQqfZgQ7kBlqzkfQv0F4lBsFbH3mfNLODvkOf6bJqTcR9ROzIlBE_Xu_y9XUdPraY_7IPCNUfbCFhicF7mUo6fAh-fm17fOnIO3mJJrhUOYSH0wKb56vbeGptc7Jm0NZtn6gay1UZoK2vW3dgYcb_Kpc8l21bSoh0-Dp4Rik6VupVYNcKcvLT0JOE4DYFTd0XuP4h7SzIK9HPL01lL1au8mygdgf9GQqHvqxVq_AG5G7Nf3MFs2KfPqrKGXByBL).

This will continue to grow and in some part, it's thanks to the work we have been doing to push back on the nonsense and instead, embrace truth and integrity. But we still have a long way to go to heal our nation's politics and refocus the GOP on offering Americans policy ideas and a hopeful vision for the future.

**Peter, I need your help to keep up the fight**. The money we raise goes directly into our advocacy work, helping us rally more supporters to fight for our country. Anything you'd be willing to contribute to that effort is most appreciated.
[DONATE TODAY](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=0c54fdc504024e81ae0cf060722b4dea&_e=0_bSRBqkiiKlTlNps92T_Zm1aZy-MxPYgBqz87PJXXbCmIh9CkLVlhPQhVNGxussUVU-PznVTkGKxU11TNaNBqedyrPXgypbcxUe_cqtcXALZpo5mwuq48uwKajGaxGC8v001tCm1BxFW5cmwEwtuSzQaDGaQcKFdTigSziF8aq_XiLsWVAkrsffgPcjb9KCmnOVv48DI_WlQAnQ16DDtcG53Lr0wALxtyGMGTwMvXDFdoeyJvgjllq0G5WUcm5IQtC93ePXV5YRM-h6Zjh24w%3D%3D)
**What happened Wednesday gives me hope that each of us has the power to make a difference**. If you live in a district represented by somebody who voted against this, reach out and ask them why. If they feel enough pressure from their constituents, just watch as they find their courage.

Together, we are making a real difference. Thank you for all that you're doing!

-John

|

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: frustrating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We’re never going to solve big problems with piecemeal solutions.
#

You know what I find so frustrating?
I’m fed up with my colleagues in Congress who think the best we can do is uphold the status quo.
The status quo is that millions of Americans cannot afford health care, are drowning in student loan debt, and are becoming increasingly disenfranchised by Republican governors and Republican-led state legislatures who are hostile to our democracy, because they know they can’t win with their policy ideas.
**We’re never going to solve big problems with piecemeal solutions. I’m fighting every day to pursue bold, progressive solutions to our society’s ills — but that could make me a target this election cycle, even within the Democratic Party.**
**[If you can, please make a donation to my re-election campaign today to keep our progressive, people-powered movement going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29685630/287184480/-1533274318?refcode2=01146a71-c9bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210524-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE0NmE3MS1jOWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTqrbRiUup3P4hzm1O35GEBqHw0zjxjnHkyDd0c0LM4=)**
When it comes to voting rights, the Senate must pass _both_ the _For the People Act_ and the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ , which address different challenges to the integrity of our democracy.
Creating jobs and rebuilding our infrastructure are both critical components to building our economy back better than ever, but we will never bridge the gap between the haves and the have-nots if we don’t address the student debt crisis. The president can revitalize the economy with the stroke of his pen by cancelling billions of dollars in federal student loans that are holding back millions of Americans from buying a home, starting a family, and saving for retirement.
Congress can play offense every time the 6-3 far-right supermajority on the Supreme Court threatens our fundamental human rights, but the most effective way to get to the heart of the matter is to expand the Court to save our democracy. From abortion and LGBTQ+ rights to the right to vote, everything we hold dear is at risk if we keep the status quo in our judicial system.
And we can do all of this while holding the perpetrators of the events of January 6th accountable, including the members of Congress who incited the violent insurrection. There is no chance for unity _without_ accountability, no matter what excuses Republicans come up with.
**[I’m fired up and fighting for bold, progressive solutions, but I can’t keep up this fight without your help. Please make a donation to my re-election campaign today, because with redistricting looming, we don’t know what challenges lie ahead — but we must prepare now to overcome any obstacle that comes our way this cycle.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29685631/287184481/-1533274318?refcode2=01146a71-c9bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210524-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE0NmE3MS1jOWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTqrbRiUup3P4hzm1O35GEBqHw0zjxjnHkyDd0c0LM4=)**
Thank you for your continued support. It is the honor of my life to serve in Congress. I’ll never stop fighting to build an America where working people can thrive, not just survive.

clean_body: We’re never going to solve big problems with piecemeal solutions. You know what I find so frustrating? I’m fed up with my colleagues in Congress who think the best we can do is uphold the status quo. The status quo is that millions of Americans cannot afford health care, are drowning in student loan debt, and are becoming increasingly disenfranchised by Republican governors and Republican-led state legislatures who are hostile to our democracy, because they know they can’t win with their policy ideas. We’re never going to solve big problems with piecemeal solutions. I’m fighting every day to pursue bold, progressive solutions to our society’s ills — but that could make me a target this election cycle, even within the Democratic Party. = When it comes to voting rights, the Senate must pass both the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act , which address different challenges to the integrity of our democracy. Creating jobs and rebuilding our infrastructure are both critical components to building our economy back better than ever, but we will never bridge the gap between the haves and the have-nots if we don’t address the student debt crisis. The president can revitalize the economy with the stroke of his pen by cancelling billions of dollars in federal student loans that are holding back millions of Americans from buying a home, starting a family, and saving for retirement. Congress can play offense every time the 6-3 far-right supermajority on the Supreme Court threatens our fundamental human rights, but the most effective way to get to the heart of the matter is to expand the Court to save our democracy. From abortion and LGBTQ+ rights to the right to vote, everything we hold dear is at risk if we keep the status quo in our judicial system. And we can do all of this while holding the perpetrators of the events of January 6th accountable, including the members of Congress who incited the violent insurrection. There is no chance for unity without accountability, no matter what excuses Republicans come up with. = Thank you for your continued support. It is the honor of my life to serve in Congress. I’ll never stop fighting to build an America where working people can thrive, not just survive. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. subject: Rep. Nicole Malliotakis betrayed us. Help us hold her accountable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NICPAC (NICPAC
body:
Within days of taking office, our Congresswoman voted to overturn the election. Help us defeat her. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us7.campaign-archive.com/?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=0f20595a0e&e=07cb4a6a22)

| |
#
Dear Peter,

Here in Staten Island and Southern Brooklyn, we care deeply about our country, and about the Constitution.

On January 6th, in the aftermath of a violent and lawless attack on our Capitol, Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis showed she doesn't.

Within days of taking office, she went off the deep end, voting to overturn the election and allying herself with the Q-Anon crowd, hyping up lies and conspiracy theories.

Then, she went on to vote against federal funding for public transit, which NYC desperately needs, and against COVID relief. She's making one bad decision after another and that's why we must defeat her in 2022.

[**Can you chip in $11, for New York’s 11th District, so we can make sure she's not re-elected?**](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=aebfb6a129&e=07cb4a6a22)

---
| We're grateful for your support.

Sincerely,

Jonathan
The NICPAC Team

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of May 24th: It’s sign up week!
body:
| |
---
In an effort to keep the republic, and based on feedback from the grassroots, we are launching a program called the Eternal Vigilance Project. See below for more details, and opportunities to sign up and get involved! We will be rolling out more information about this project as we move forward, and we also want to know if you are interested in running for local or state office, and more.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Sign up for the Eternal Vigilance Project**
In order to keep the republic, America needs as many patriots as possible to commit to specific actions over the next year and half that include actions at the local level, as well as action at the national level.

There are two levels of volunteer positions available; please sign up for the one that fits your availability and abilities best. We must fill these positions as the first step of the Eternal Vigilance Project, so please see the descriptions on our website and choose the one that is right for you!
[KEEPER OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMva2VlcGVyLW9mLXRoZS1yZXB1YmxpYy8_bWlkPTQzODI0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=VArVN0MTv9VX25chdUtTBA)
[CHAMPION OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvY2hhbXBpb24tb2YtdGhlLXJlcHVibGljLz9taWQ9NDM4MjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=P0oCZ1YUfpdXlBTB2AuI8Q)

|
---
On Friday, a judge in Fulton County, [Georgia granted the motion to unseal in the case Favorito v. Cooney](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xMzk2ODU4NjU0OTUxOTc2OTYxLz9taWQ9NDM4MjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=yDSzhIalJDkt87_wn0CJmg). Earlier this month, Tea Party Patriots Foundation (TPPF) filed [an amicus curiae brief](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS90ZWEtcGFydHktcGF0cmlvdHMtZm91bmRhdGlvbi1maWxlcy1hbWljdXMtY3VyaWFlLWJyaWVmLWluLWdhLWZvci0yMDIwLWVsZWN0aW9uLz9taWQ9NDM4MjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=qz53JVQi9vg0fl0ZGdTdeA) in support of the petitioner’s motion to unseal paper ballots and compel production of ballots. Under the ruling, the petitioner is allowed to inspect and scan the ballots. Further order of the court will lay out the protocols.

In response, TPPF President Jenny Beth Martin issued the following statement:
_**“** This is a big win for all those who care about election integrity and want to make sure that future elections are conducted the right way. This is a critical issue for all Americans, regardless of party affiliation. For the American people to accept election results, there has to be confidence in the process. As of right now, there is a lack of confidence in that process and that confidence must be restored. Today’s ruling is an important step in giving us the answers we need to move forward and rebuild trust.”_
|
---
**Are You Interested in Running for Local Office?**
We want to help those of you who are interested in running for local or state office with training, so that you can be successful and hold the line in your city and/or state. This would be positions like school boards, health boards, city councils, state legislator, etc. When you sign up, you are not committing to running for office, but simply indicating that you are interested in doing so.
[FIND MY MEMBERS OF CONGRESS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9teS50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9jb250YWN0LWNvbmdyZXNzLz9taWQ9NDM4MjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=-RUU-eMhrth2ACXc9_lZHw)
|
---
In just over 6 months, our nation has gone from expecting one of the greatest economic comebacks in American history to coming to grips with a rapidly rising inflation rate and a possible recession just around the corner.

What changed? Simple, Donald Trump left office and the progressive puppet Joe Biden took the oath of office.

Immediately Biden and Congressional Democrats opened up the government coffers, determined to drain them dry. In his first 100 days in office, Joe Biden proposed spending nearly $10 trillion... that's nearly half of the nation's GDP.

One of the hallmarks of the Biden Presidency thus far, that derailed our economic recovery and dropped us in the crisis that we now find ourselves in, was the extension of overgenerous unemployment benefits. With one stroke of a pen, Joe Biden incentivized American workers to stay home, despite millions of jobs being open and businesses ready to start ramping up production again.

As demand naturally rose, businesses couldn't meet that demand, because they could not find employees to work. So, as demand rose, supply remained the same, causing prices to go up across the board. Businesses are ready to meet the existing demand but can't, because Joe Biden and Congressional Democrats are paying people to stay home.

The only thing Biden is "building back" is the inflation rate.
|
---
**Plan Your Summer Events Now**
The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! [We have a form for you to fill out](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzMxZnBfUk5YQTlaMWtVZDB0LXUyVDNPdndadnRURUd3MDExaU9PUlBiS2hvb0tBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00MzgyNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Q1R3VgKK57LD7b8ylOtRvw) to let us know if you will be participating, so that we can send you any resources we create and send you updates.
* Before June 10th: A national sign-waving event calling for secure borders, at a time of your choosing.
* June 29th: A national sign-waving event with the theme “United We Stand, Happy Early Independence Day.”
* July: National Attend a School Board Meeting Month
* August: National Attend a Local City Council/County Commission Meeting Month

**[Please fill out the form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzMxZnBfUk5YQTlaMWtVZDB0LXUyVDNPdndadnRURUd3MDExaU9PUlBiS2hvb0tBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00MzgyNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=t1QQ4T9ON1wAzR1lugWLFA) letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events.**
|
---
Why are schools across the nation not open entirely? This is a question we have been asking for months now...

The science is clear and private schools have successfully opened and stayed open, so why were (and in some cases still are) public school systems closed?

For months, Democrats assured us that they were simply "following CDC guidelines" and would re-open when the CDC gave the green light.

Well, it turns out it wasn't the CDC's approval schools were looking for, it was approval from corrupt teachers union leaders.

According to the New York Post:

_"The American Federation of Teachers lobbied the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention on, and even suggested language for, the federal agency’s school-reopening guidance released in February._
_ _
_The powerful teachers union’s full-court press preceded the federal agency putting the brakes on a full re-opening of in-person classrooms, emails between top CDC, AFT and White House officials show."_
Just as we suspected, it had nothing to do with "the science," and was entirely political. Enough of the nonsense, all schools should be open at 100% capacity, anything less is unacceptable.

[Read the full NY Post story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMDUvMDEvdGVhY2hlcnMtdW5pb24tY29sbGFib3JhdGVkLXdpdGgtY2RjLW9uLXNjaG9vbC1yZW9wZW5pbmctZW1haWxzLz9taWQ9NDM4MjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Cswlea21QdC3eCn0CcIPDg)
|
---
**Call Your Representative**
On Thursday, May 27th, House Judiciary will have a hearing at 9am titled: “Oversight of the Voting Rights Act: The Evolving Landscape of Voter Discrimination.” This will be the beginning of the House Democrats’ efforts to push the John Lewis Act, which would require some states and cities – If not every state and city in America – to get approval from the corrupt and left-wing Justice Department in order to make _any_ changes to voting laws at all. How much you want to bet that the DOJ will not be approving changes that make it easier to vote, but _harder to cheat_?

Call your Rep. on Wednesday, May 26th, the day before the hearing. Tell your Rep. to:
* Oppose the “John Lewis Act”

* Oppose Sen. Manchin’s proposal to make the John Lewis Act apply to all 50 states

* Oppose the “Voter Empowerment Act of 2021”

* Oppose any bills or changes to our voting system that makes it easier to cheat

[FIND MY MEMBERS OF CONGRESS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTQ0LTFlNzY1Yjk4ZTQ4OTRjMjBiMjRhMWE2OWZkZjJlZWM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9teS50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9jb250YWN0LWNvbmdyZXNzLz9taWQ9NDM4MjQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=dQu6_-QcqvA1xHb3tDTYzQ)
|

Joe Biden's Department of Defense is rolling out the red-carpet for discredited activists to play key roles in a working group concerned with "countering extremism."

In the words of the Post Millennial, "If anyone was concerned about the news about a Space Force commander being relieved of duty for speaking out about the military's ideological enforcement of Marxism, this news will accelerate that by several magnitudes."

This is why Nancy Pelosi and her coastal liberals want to win back this seat and turn Iowa blue. Last year, Nancy Pelosi and her Hollywood allies poured **_nearly 3 MILLION dollars_** into Iowa to try and beat Randy, and they will do it again. They know that if they can beat Randy they will cement their liberal majority and we need your help to stop them. I’m asking you to contribute to Randy today to ensure we hold this seat and take the gavel from Pelosi. **Will you join me and contribute to Randy’s campaign today?**
