name: Erica Smith
subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
If elected, I’d be the first Black woman U.S. Senator for North Carolina.
#
With momentum growing for our campaign, I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself again, y'all.
**I’m Erica Smith.** I’m an engineer, educator, minister, and three-term state senator.
Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina in 2022. **If elected, I’d be the first Black woman U.S. Senator to represent the Tar Heel state!!!**
[**_In just a moment, I’m going to humbly ask you to make a donation to our campaign and become an official Founding Donor of our moral movement._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1575?refcode=em20210524-112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=112%2E3698%2EuHa7mT) But first, I wanted to tell you a little more about myself.
I don’t come from wealth. I come from hard work.
My father was in the Air Force. I was born at Fort Bragg Army base right here in North Carolina. My mom raised me and my five siblings, and we grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the family farm.
Life wasn’t always easy. Farming was difficult, and so was growing up Black in the South. But our elders taught us the dignity of work, the value of faith, and the importance of serving our communities.
I know what it means to struggle. And in fact,**the struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families face today.** We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re fighting floods and storms that claim our livelihoods.
Meanwhile, who is really on the other side of that fight? I’ll tell you: Morally-bankrupt politicians who grant billionaires tax cuts, yet fail to ensure workers a living wage.
And I’m not just talking about Republicans like Senator Richard Burr. **We’ve seen what happens when North Carolina Democrats pick candidates who don’t represent the experiences and diversity of our state.**
We need something different because our survival depends on it. That’s why I’m running for the United States Senate. North Carolina deserves a senator who works for all of us, instead of just the wealthy and the well-connected.
Together, we will build a grassroots campaign for a different North Carolina — one that loves us back the same way we love it. And we’re doing it all without taking a dime from corporate PACs or fossil fuel companies (those guys already have enough servants in Congress).
**An important part of building our grassroots campaign is folks like you chipping into emails like this one. I have to ask:**
[**_Will you please make a contribution to our campaign right now and become an official Founding Donor of Erica Smith for U.S. Senate? Every bit of support that comes our way is critical during this early period of our campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1575?refcode=em20210524-112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=112%2E3698%2EuHa7mT)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1575?refcode=em20210524-112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=112%2E3698%2EuHa7mT)**
Together, we are building a North Carolina where our God-given potential will be enhanced by a system meant to lift us up, and not squandered by one meant to hold us down.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica Smith
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210524-112-footer&t=22&refcode2=112_3698_uHa7mT&akid=112%2E3698%2EuHa7mT)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=112%2E3698%2EuHa7mT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=112%2E3698%2EuHa7mT)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Rep. Ken Rahjes
subject: Derek Schmidt is my choice for Governor.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
And I’ll tell you why... Friend, It is with great pleasure that today I write to inform you of my endorsement of Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas. Kansans are ready for our state's comeback. Business owners, farmers, ranchers, and families all want to have hope again that our state can reach its full potential. But I’m not just talking about Kansas emerging from the pandemic and getting back to normal... I’m talking about Kansas getting new leadership in the Governor’s office. **I’m talking about Derek Schmidt.** Why? Well, for starters, he’s a real conservative... And not the “in-name-only” type, if you know what I mean. When the fights get hard, he doesn’t cave, and he’s proven that time and time again. While it seems early to endorse, this race is so critical to the future of my family and others like yours, I believe it is time to support a candidate that is prepared like none other: Derek Schmidt. He’s a fierce defender of the unborn. As Attorney General he has seen attack after attack against pro-life laws, and he has vigourusly stood for the unborn, arguing that no right to abortion exists under the Kansas Constitution. He is solid in his belief that human life is a gift from God, and if we will ever stand for anything, we must first stand for life. And our state’s farmers and ranchers? They can trust Derek to support them through thick and thin. He recognizes the importance of fostering new agricultural opportunities – on our farmland and on main street. But most importantly, Derek Schmidt shares our values – Kansas values. He served on and was chairman of the Agriculture Committee while he was in the Senate. Not only does he know the priorities of our farmers and ranchers, he’s championed them.
**That’s why I’m supporting Derek Schmidt, and why I think you should too.**[**And if you’re up for it, I invite you to join him as a volunteer.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6df630a7640f481caa2b17febb5d6aac&_e=M3WUczt9WUemqJSKR-eMtA4QOntG-mY8u7pp4zo48h7jqYKDhSp7UU-0x5ljtMsATtzQQenmuniC-9716SiTGi7-tpgvPLC2ppie2EVlYcYufMgZsedaEzQCGzlsGt-jnCoHwzzAazkq6Kk-v-0EIoujbKIGN7prUobVymV-M5uuvOzHA5Brs22FDWHZZpsgnKhBlqbrpz-GkAlMAAmucKnnC7GxFpzNSLaJxAfjhOun7Xzbdgiu-FT6zxcSRpW7uRlT0B6tYjAdEA731BVN_nyC5OtgAWh4Fi836fK4uNeinVig7Risd9hLRLxqMk239xGGCjz9zpsd5nJwnqJ0p7FX1vQTtoDhQURJKJvw5JrheT9O7Z_bQbld6g6lc5_CSWlSslvmOlblWCM_oxMnyEKvCQ-CD9Dtgo8VeAJISH8Y3tYgOOhILhkJfd6MOKrL) [**JOIN THE TEAM**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6df630a7640f481caa2b17febb5d6aac&_e=M3WUczt9WUemqJSKR-eMtA4QOntG-mY8u7pp4zo48h7jqYKDhSp7UU-0x5ljtMsATtzQQenmuniC-9716SiTGi7-tpgvPLC2ppie2EVlYcYufMgZsedaEzQCGzlsGt-jnCoHwzzAazkq6Kk-v-0EIoujbKIGN7prUobVymV-M5uuvOzHA5Brs22FDWHZZpsgnKhBlqbrpz-GkAlMAAmucKnnC7GxFpzNSLaJxAfjhOuYZ8V1xJZ3LSj61kl95vKEVMkn_bFpLkvxhiVWHXcGiFJIi5cp93IOF6Fh29PS0A6R5N4CXIyGlQbcmDRp-Cy1agqvc7IIeNNcnxxe3vRJNLDJNledxKgk-ycIjthp9jIZdO5yeGoyvCNtDFdGxmb_BcUddyCmvSQPWSexHgy0Zg3s554AZwI_6Jxgqdd1LJEIeUGttPrvKz5qSVBlBfIa) As Attorney General, Derek has already proven to Kansans that he’s up for the task. He has consistently risen to the occasion to defend the Sunflower State’s status as the greatest place to live, work, and raise a family. We need Derek Schmidt to lead the great state of Kansas. I am proud to give him my full support. –Ken Rahjes | |

subject: Sign the petition: We must investigate January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
|
---
| | On January 6th, a violent mob breached the security perimeter of the U.S. Capitol, stormed the building, and attempted to stop the peaceful transfer of power in our democracy. we must never forget what happened on January 6, 2021. Millions of Americans, and more around the world, watched it unfold on live television. And yet, it is fair to say that we do not yet have a comprehensive understanding of how it happened — who organized it and funded it (if anyone) and why there were such catastrophic security failures. **We need a bipartisan panel to review the causes and consequences of January 6th and to make recommendations to ensure such a breach never happens again.** [**Will you join me by signing a petition demanding a bipartisan panel to investigate the events of January 6th?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29689866/287201537/345549672?contactdata=Uc8RFejnmi5BXWIM%2B3YfXAJoLcgE%2BSUbzps0Ec6IvlGD9Bu%2BuwtzIu6Yw4InzH8Lsbv9VwNjK2y06wY2FUqEkwAxNVZ3ajb8y%2FfZmomDyJmzxzA1Er3JihXWFq%2BoYKL%2FrCA1pSEm8fvC4aR%2BjNJNow%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjlhNjIzNi1kN2JjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qs_XwbtZ7lp618IgiVCk15AwUOWo5b2sK3XHQd_hOXo=&emci=98e4b1b4-d0bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf9a6236-d7bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9494239) This should not even be a debate. But sadly, just 35 Republicans joined the Democrats in the House in voting to approve the panel. And now, Senator Mitch McConnell says he will oppose the bipartisan investigation. Apparently, Mitch McConnell has changed his mind. This is what he said on February 13th on the Senate floor: "There's no question — none — that President Trump is practically and morally responsible for provoking the events of the day. No question about it. The people who stormed this building believed they were acting on the wishes and instructions of their president. The leader of the free world cannot spend weeks thundering that shadowy forces are stealing our country and then feign surprise when people believe him and do reckless things." I agree with that Mitch McConnell. But now, he has changed his tune. [**Please sign our petition**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29689867/287201540/345549672?contactdata=Uc8RFejnmi5BXWIM%2B3YfXAJoLcgE%2BSUbzps0Ec6IvlGD9Bu%2BuwtzIu6Yw4InzH8Lsbv9VwNjK2y06wY2FUqEkwAxNVZ3ajb8y%2FfZmomDyJmzxzA1Er3JihXWFq%2BoYKL%2FrCA1pSEm8fvC4aR%2BjNJNow%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjlhNjIzNi1kN2JjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qs_XwbtZ7lp618IgiVCk15AwUOWo5b2sK3XHQd_hOXo=&emci=98e4b1b4-d0bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf9a6236-d7bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9494239) and demand that Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans find the courage to go beyond empty words of blame and investigate who encouraged it, who organized it, and who funded it (if anyone). And what we can do to make sure it never happens again. [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29689868/287201541/345549672?contactdata=Uc8RFejnmi5BXWIM%2B3YfXAJoLcgE%2BSUbzps0Ec6IvlGD9Bu%2BuwtzIu6Yw4InzH8Lsbv9VwNjK2y06wY2FUqEkwAxNVZ3ajb8y%2FfZmomDyJmzxzA1Er3JihXWFq%2BoYKL%2FrCA1pSEm8fvC4aR%2BjNJNow%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjlhNjIzNi1kN2JjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qs_XwbtZ7lp618IgiVCk15AwUOWo5b2sK3XHQd_hOXo=&emci=98e4b1b4-d0bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf9a6236-d7bc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9494239) clean_body: | | | On January 6th, a violent mob breached the security perimeter of the U.S. Capitol, stormed the building, and attempted to stop the peaceful transfer of power in our democracy. we must never forget what happened on January 6, 2021. Millions of Americans, and more around the world, watched it unfold on live television. And yet, it is fair to say that we do not yet have a comprehensive understanding of how it happened — who organized it and funded it (if anyone) and why there were such catastrophic security failures. We need a bipartisan panel to review the causes and consequences of January 6th and to make recommendations to ensure such a breach never happens again. This should not even be a debate. But sadly, just 35 Republicans joined the Democrats in the House in voting to approve the panel. And now, Senator Mitch McConnell says he will oppose the bipartisan investigation. Apparently, Mitch McConnell has changed his mind. This is what he said on February 13th on the Senate floor: "There's no question — none — that President Trump is practically and morally responsible for provoking the events of the day. No question about it. The people who stormed this building believed they were acting on the wishes and instructions of their president. The leader of the free world cannot spend weeks thundering that shadowy forces are stealing our country and then feign surprise when people believe him and do reckless things." I agree with that Mitch McConnell. But now, he has changed his tune. and demand that Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans find the courage to go beyond empty words of blame and investigate who encouraged it, who organized it, and who funded it (if anyone). And what we can do to make sure it never happens again. body:

This week, my campaign is facing our FINAL filing deadline before the primary in just over two weeks. If you have been waiting to give or have the ability to double down your support, this is the time.

> Throughout her life, Jennifer’s community inspired her to capture her potential and blaze her own path — one that led her to become one of the first women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute and serve in the House of Delegates just after giving birth to twins.

_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. name: James Hartnett
subject: Essential supplies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey everyone!
We kicked the campaign off on April 5th and we’re off to a great start! As we scale the campaign, we will need resources to officially open an office, bring on staff, and produce campaign literature to give out to our supporters and volunteers. You’ve been great so far in your support of this campaign, so I wanted to ask if you’d chip in $10 or $20 today to help us pay for buttons, literature, and yard signs for Stewart. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210524-email]
Chip in $5 for pens → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210524-email&amount=5] Chip in $15 for buttons → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210524-email&amount=15] Chip in $25 for campaign literature → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210524-email&amount=25] Chip in $50 for yard signs → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210524-email&amount=50] Chip in $100 to pay for a office → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210524-email&amount=100]Virginians deserve a Representative who will work for them in Washington -- not the special interests. It is time for all of us, no matter where we live, to have access to a world class education, a good paying job, and affordable healthcare.
Help us pay for the supplies we’re going to need to send him to Congress by donating any amount here. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210524-email]
Thank you for your support,
James
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

I’ll be honest folks, it’s not looking good for us right now. We’ve fallen short of our online fundraising goals every single day this month, so we’ve set a $30,000 goal for this week to get back on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Over the next few months, we’ll be hiring staff on the ground, investing in digital ads, and reaching out to every voter we can. After all, Maggie only won by 1,017 votes in 2016, so early investment will make all the difference in holding this seat. But if we don’t reach our May fundraising goal, our campaign — and the Senate majority — will be in jeopardy. = I really appreciate your help. Thank you for being a part of this team. Meredith Shevitz Maggie for NH | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Susie Lee
subject: Your monthly campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29694639/287215742/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210524_EN_UPDATE_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThmNTYxMS1lYWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdK9zzOg_HJ2QhJ_flPSxGet5E6ajZDKxI-5jkVfeXY=) Hi Team, I’m back with another campaign update because it matters to me that you know where we stand leading up to the election. Since the last time I wrote to you, we’ve hit fundraising goals, passed important legislation, and even got a new Republican opponent. Here’s what we’ve been up to:
* * *
## CAMPAIGN UPDATES
**A third Republican opponent has filed to run against me.** We now know that not only did he just move to Nevada from New Jersey _— where he ran for Congress in 2020 —_ but he also _authored a xenophobic blogpost._ I’ll say it time and time again: _hatred isn’t welcome in this district,_ or anywhere across Nevada for that matter. Our campaign will continue to rise above the division that the Republican Party wants so badly to sow. But, they don’t know that _we’re stronger_ than that and will remain united in our cause to help the people of NV-03. Let’s get to the good news — I’m excited to announce that **we met last month’s fundraising goal!** So many strong supporters like yourself have stepped up to the plate to chip into this campaign. I couldn’t be more proud to have you by my side — I know this campaign has some of the best grassroots support in the country. Thank you for your support.
* * *
## POLICY UPDATES
President Biden’s initiative, the American Families Plan, has _overwhelming support_ from a majority of Americans. Here’s how research has shown that it will positively impact Nevadan families:
* **83,000 new jobs in Nevada** in childcare and prekindergarten industries
* **Universal preschool** for three- and four-year-olds in Nevada
* **Two free years of community college** for our students
* Groundbreaking **paid family and medical leave** program
* Tax credits to **drastically cut child poverty** in Nevada

I’ll have President Biden’s back when the American Families Plan comes to a vote in the House just as I did when we passed the American Rescue Plan.
* * *
## AT HOME IN NEVADA
Just recently, **the National Teacher of the Year was announced to be Nevada’s own Juliana Urtubey!** Juliana is the first Nevadan to receive this award and represents the very best of our teachers across the state. Also, under Governor Sisolak’s leadership, **Nevada has officially hit 2 million doses of the COVID-19 vaccine administered.** This is a _monumental_ milestone for our vaccination efforts at home, but make no mistake, _we still have a long way to go._ Now that the vaccine is available to all adults, it’s critical that we do what we can to help our neighbors, family, and friends get vaccinated. I know this was a big update. With my campaign team so hard at work, I just can’t help but share the work we’re proud to be doing. Thank you so much for your support. Talk soon, \- Susie Lee | | | [Donate Now! >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29694640/287215743/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210524_EN_UPDATE_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThmNTYxMS1lYWJjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NdK9zzOg_HJ2QhJ_flPSxGet5E6ajZDKxI-5jkVfeXY=)

body:

| | | Patriot,

Congressman LaTurner is working hard in Washington DC to get wins for Republicans. Every single day he's standing up to the leftist Democrats and fighting for our conservative values.

The radical Democrats under Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are bad for America.

| **We have just one week until our end-of-month deadline.** Will you help us show the Democrats how energized our supporters are by giving a [donation to our campaign](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=183dbe39f2&e=1050d051da)?

We are working tirelessly to spread **_Jake's message of freedom and Kansas values to voters all over the district_** , and we need help to make sure we get a head start on our Democrat opponent.

We only need **$8,427 to reach our end-of-month goal.**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: A huge step in the right direction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We're making our tax system fairer. Here's how.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHYmpr4TR/MG5yMEJqL1FKY3M4UUN1c1lZNWRRT24xZFBmSU9zdDJmYmU5ODZQQUE0MnNJa2ZPbjYzWXNpK0hscDFROWFvekNEYjg4dWtXMzB3U1d6aE1DRXFUTUZOYmR4MGUrQkZxTEM2UVlHZDBUWnM9S0/NHhxZHR4K3IxMS9zYUV5ZitvQ0xEaVlSa1ZqTkhTc0p6OVdZckZZNXRrOD0S1) Friend, For too long, low-income Washingtonians have been paying 17% of their income in taxes, while the wealthiest pay just 3%. It's upside-down. It's unjust. And it's got to end. This legislative session, Washington state took a huge step in the right direction by passing a capital gains tax, and I was proud to sign it into law earlier this month. **In a moment, I 'm going to explain why this matters so much. But first, I want to ask if you'll continue to help us transform our tax system into one that serves working people, not just the wealthiest Americans. [Will you donate today so we can continue to make our tax system fairer together?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3h~ZqRzT8/MG5yMEJqL1FKY3M4UUN1c1lZNWRRT24xZFBmSU9zdDJmYmU5ODZQQUE0MnNJa2ZPbjYzWXNpK0hscDFROWFvekNEYjg4dWtXMzB3U1d6aE1DRXFUTUZOYmR4MGUrQkZxTEM2UVlHZDBUWnM9S0/NHhxZHR4K3IxMS9zYUV5ZitvQ0xEaVlSa1ZqTkhTc0p6OVdZckZZNXRrOD0S1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/34WRSN7~jGFj/MG5yMEJqL1FKY3M4UUN1c1lZNWRRT24xZFBmSU9zdDJmYmU5ODZQQUE0MnNJa2ZPbjYzWXNpK0hscDFROWFvekNEYjg4dWtXMzB3U1d6aE1DRXFUTUZOYmR4MGUrQkZxTEM2UVlHZDBUWnM9S0/NHhxZHR4K3IxMS9zYUV5ZitvQ0xEaVlSa1ZqTkhTc0p6OVdZckZZNXRrOD0S1)

Until now, Washington was one of just a few states that didn't tax capital gains (profits from selling investments like stocks and bonds). Under the new law, investments sold at a profit of more than $250,000 will then be taxed at 7% -- this is expected to affect less than one-quarter of one percent of Washingtonians.
But the _revenue_ from those taxes will affect _hundreds of thousands_ of Washingtonians because we're going to invest it in child care and public education throughout the state. In other words, the wealthiest Washingtonians will help the next generation of Washingtonians thrive, simply by paying their fair share.
I'm proud that we are taking a big step toward a fairer system and grateful to the many organizations, coalitions, and individuals who pushed for this progress alongside me. **[If you're in a position to do so, donate today so we can keep making progress on economic justice and equity here in Washington state.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMVr8WyQL/MG5yMEJqL1FKY3M4UUN1c1lZNWRRT24xZFBmSU9zdDJmYmU5ODZQQUE0MnNJa2ZPbjYzWXNpK0hscDFROWFvekNEYjg4dWtXMzB3U1d6aE1DRXFUTUZOYmR4MGUrQkZxTEM2UVlHZDBUWnM9S0/NHhxZHR4K3IxMS9zYUV5ZitvQ0xEaVlSa1ZqTkhTc0p6OVdZckZZNXRrOD0S1)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

clean_body: We're making our tax system fairer. Here's how. | Friend, For too long, low-income Washingtonians have been paying 17% of their income in taxes, while the wealthiest pay just 3%. It's upside-down. It's unjust. And it's got to end. This legislative session, Washington state took a huge step in the right direction by passing a capital gains tax, and I was proud to sign it into law earlier this month. In a moment, I 'm going to explain why this matters so much. But first, I want to ask if you'll continue to help us transform our tax system into one that serves working people, not just the wealthiest Americans. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Until now, Washington was one of just a few states that didn't tax capital gains (profits from selling investments like stocks and bonds). Under the new law, investments sold at a profit of more than $250,000 will then be taxed at 7% -- this is expected to affect less than one-quarter of one percent of Washingtonians. But the revenue from those taxes will affect hundreds of thousands_ of Washingtonians because we're going to invest it in child care and public education throughout the state. In other words, the wealthiest Washingtonians will help the next generation of Washingtonians thrive, simply by paying their fair share. I'm proud that we are taking a big step toward a fairer system and grateful to the many organizations, coalitions, and individuals who pushed for this progress alongside me. Very truly yours, Jay

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Montgomery County Public Schools Spent $454,000 on ‘Anti-racist System Audit’
body:
Judicial Watch announced it received 685 pages of heavily redacted records from Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS) including documents related to their “Anti-racist system audit” and critical race theory classes.

County Gives Illegal Immigrants Special IDs to Get Vaccines, Public Services](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55756&L=24955&F=H&)** Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines. Elected officials in Broward County, situated in southeast Florida with a population of about two million, unanimously passed the measure with ardent support from the county’s top law enforcement officer, Sheriff Gregory Tony. Republican Governor Ron DeSantis appointed Tony to the elected position after suspending former Broward Sheriff Scott Israel for mishandling the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland. Even members of Congress representing the impacted districts are being kept in the dark about the covert operations and the Department of Defense (DOD) is contracting big tour buses to move the migrants to nearby states once they land, presumably from the southern border region. The alarming details are featured in a well-sourced news report broadcast by a Tennessee media outlet this week. The segment—and accompanying article—features videos of planes arriving at a Chattanooga private jet terminal called Wilson Air Center. Adolescents who appear to be in their early teens are seen deboarding the planes carrying matching bags then boarding large tour busses parked on the runway. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced it received 685 pages of heavily redacted records from Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS) including documents related to their “Anti-racist system audit” and critical race theory classes. | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 24, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The documents, obtained under the Maryland Public Information Act, reveal that students of “Maryland’s Largest School District” who attended Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class were taught that the phrase “Make America Great Again” was an example of “covert white supremacy.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below “lynching,” “hate crimes,” “the N-word” and “racial slurs.” They were also taught that “white privilege” means being favored by school authorities and having a positive relationship with the police. ---|--- | | | | == | == Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines. Elected officials in Broward County, situated in southeast Florida with a population of about two million, unanimously passed the measure with ardent support from the county’s top law enforcement officer, Sheriff Gregory Tony. Republican Governor Ron DeSantis appointed Tony to the elected position after suspending former Broward Sheriff Scott Israel for mishandling the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland. == ---|--- | | | | == | == In an apparent effort to avoid public scrutiny, the Biden administration is transporting planeloads of illegal immigrant minors in the middle of the night then busing them to cities in the southeast. Even members of Congress representing the impacted districts are being kept in the dark about the covert operations and the Department of Defense (DOD) is contracting big tour buses to move the migrants to nearby states once they land, presumably from the southern border region. The alarming details are featured in a well-sourced news report broadcast by a Tennessee media outlet this week. The segment—and accompanying article—features videos of planes arriving at a Chattanooga private jet terminal called Wilson Air Center. Adolescents who appear to be in their early teens are seen deboarding the planes carrying matching bags then boarding large tour busses parked on the runway. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Rising crime poses a big problem for the Left, which nationwide has pushed hard on criminal-justice issues with calls to defund the police and empty the jails. In New York, a draft platform from a coalition of radical left-wing groups, obtained by Judicial Watch, suggests the scope of the Left’s national agenda. = ---|--- | | | = Newsmax The documents, obtained under the Maryland Public Information Act, reveal that students of “Maryland’s Largest School District” who attended Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class were taught that the phrase “Make America Great Again” was an example of “covert white supremacy.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below, “lynching,” “hate crimes,” “the N-word” and “racial slurs.” They were also taught that “white privilege” means being favored by school authorities and having a positive relationship with the police. = == Breitbart Despite this evidence that there was not an “absolute wall” between Hunter and Joe when it comes to business endeavors, the establishment press has shown little interest in exploring whether Hunter was actually leveraging his father’s power to enrich himself. In fact, quite the contrary. The New York Times, for example, published a story in 2020 portraying Hunter as a skilled artist who was mastering painting. The article, headlined “There’s a New Artist in Town. The Name Is Biden,” un-ironically featured glossy photographs of a relaxed and polished Hunter Biden working away in his studio. == Judicial Watch Students of “Maryland’s Largest School District” who attended Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class were taught that the phrase “Make America Great Again” was an example of “covert white supremacy.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below “lynching,” “hate crimes,” “the N-word” and “racial slurs.” They were also taught that “white privilege” means being favored by school authorities and having a positive relationship with the police. = = = = = = | CLIPS = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Republicans are angry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
**Republicans hate when I advocate for economic, social, racial, and environmental justice.** They lose it when I speak out in support of voting rights. They don’t like when I call for raising the minimum wage. And they call me any number of names when I push for Medicare for All, College for All, a wealth tax, and an end to the filibuster.
So, it’s really no surprise that it makes them angry when I speak out during television interviews and in print media outlets. _They dislike it so much that they take to the pages of right-wing sites like Breitbart to smear my character and attack our movement’s commitment to fighting for what’s right._
**When Republicans attack me, they’re attacking ALL of us.[But their desperate attacks simply strengthen my resolve. I won’t stop fighting for the people of this country, no matter how much the GOP comes after me. Chip in $3 or more today to help me keep up our fight in the face of right-wing attacks.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210524?refcode=em20210524-316&t=19&refcode2=316_420207_9bnm8H&akid=316%2E420207%2E9bnm8H)**
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210524?refcode=em20210524-316&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=316_420207_9bnm8H&akid=316%2E420207%2E9bnm8H)**
While the GOP is pushing the Big Lie, voting against a January 6 commission, trying to further restrict voting rights, and threatening our democracy, they still find the time to attack us and all of our work. It’s shameful — but I’m grateful that you have my back.
Thank you for standing with me today,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210524-316-footer&t=21&refcode2=316_420207_9bnm8H&akid=316%2E420207%2E9bnm8H)**

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Melanie Stansbury needs our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

We are just over one week away from one of the first special elections since 2020. In New Mexico's First District, Democrat Melanie Stansbury is running to fill the seat vacated by Secretary Deb Haaland. This election will be consequential and set the tone for 2022, so I wanted to tell you a little bit about Melanie and why she needs our support.

Melanie was a science educator, before delving into complex land and water issues, and becoming the first woman elected to represent New Mexico's 28th District in the state legislature. She has spent her career fighting for a more just and sustainable future, and now she's running for Congress to continue fighting for New Mexicans in D.C.

**With Democrats holding a slim five-seat majority in the House, it's crucial that we win this race.** But special elections typically favor the party out of the White House and the last time NM-01 held a special election, it was won by a Republican. Melanie needs our support right away to ensure she has the resources to take on her Republican opponent and win this election.

**[Will you join me in supporting Melanie Stansbury's campaign before next week's special election? Split a donation of $10 or more between our campaigns now to help us protect our Democratic House majority.](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d947d/72735be7/308264db/1e100322/287956946/VEsH/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-stansbury?gpsid=8_30_19041&refcode=em21_210525_stansb_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_stansb_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+in+supporting+Melanie+S")**

National Republicans have made it clear they'll do whatever it takes to win back the House majority. They know this race is the first step, so they've been pouring in money to defeat Melanie. To make matters worse, Melanie's opponent is a self-funded millionaire who is spending hundreds of thousands of his own money to spread lies about Melanie's record. Melanie's election will set the stage for the midterm elections. A victory for Melanie would send a signal that New Mexico rejects divisive Republican rhetoric and embraces the bold policies Democrats are passing in Congress.

I'm ready to work alongside Melanie in Congress to expand access to affordable health care, protect our environment, strengthen our economy, and more. But first, she needs our support to fight back against these attacks and win her election next week.

**[Split a donation between Melanie Stansbury's campaign and ours. Your support will help us protect our Democratic House majority and continue making progress for American families.](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d947d/72735be7/308264db/1e100325/287956946/VEsE/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-stansbury?gpsid=8_30_19041&refcode=em21_210525_stansb_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_stansb_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=2+-+Split+a+donation+between+Melanie+Stansbu")**

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?** | [DONATE](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d947d/72735be7/308264db/1e100324/287956946/VEsF/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-stansbury?gpsid=8_30_19041&refcode=em21_210525_stansb_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_stansb_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
I wanted to make sure you heard it from me | | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTgzOghzClR1bQ_PGB-IcWlIX07Q75rABouY4oSzHxU-istlQy7E6OzBrveQCY1ER6FqwzbUPkMEB0twIAjJZsDe7ULr1H-gtzTvt3c_y-PSI58yPn3Eq4scdbpZ1NMKRn52ohWJZE_0Ql7ZGonQgOhuyFv-XzqONnzUjcYAeDKAGD6V_tXmthGW_B-Ty1DXs-VReJJ0otI7AF6Bi0Y5yFwKxL9BLBgJiOYKka7dnFN2OQ/3c6/t5E3n7XDR7WdHs0zFCuuuQ/h0/OiXQxF0Rn9UUxl8AE2f-2PEQJ1j6VaCrhmiIaH6qF3M) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
I wanted to make sure you heard it from me:

I’m not in politics for myself -- I go into the halls of Congress every day thinking about what I can do to make life better for people like _you_.

But right-wing special interests are building massive fundraising war chests to defeat vulnerable Democrats in swing districts across the country.

So I’m counting on $5 and $35 donations from people like you to quickly expand this campaign and fight back.

clean_body: I wanted to make sure you heard it from me | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I wanted to make sure you heard it from me: The elections experts at Cook Political Report just labelled my district a . This means extreme Republicans will attack me with everything they’ve got. We need to prepare now in order to protect my seat -- and our Democratic Majority. | | | | | | | House Democrats lost 4 swing districts in California last year. So the far-right is going to come after me harder than ever to flip my seat! I’m not in politics for myself -- I go into the halls of Congress every day thinking about what I can do to make life better for people like you. But right-wing special interests are building massive fundraising war chests to defeat vulnerable Democrats in swing districts across the country. So I’m counting on $5 and $35 donations from people like you to quickly expand this campaign and fight back. | | | | | | Thanks. I can’t do this without you. Dr. Raul Ruiz California Democratic Congressman | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Patty Murray
subject: You are incredible, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Peter,
I want to say thank you in advance. My team just let me know that we are only a few more donations away from reaching our big fundraising goal for the first week of this campaign.
I'm running for reelection because our fight for child care, education, paid leave, and so many other critical issues for working families isn't finished yet. And even though we still have work to do to support families across the country, the GOP are already chomping at the bit to roll back every bit of our progress -- starting by handing control of the Senate back to Mitch McConnell.
Not on our watch. We're not only going to defend this seat, we're keeping our Senate majority.
I am so grateful that I can count on supporters like you to make sure we have the resources we need to build a winning campaign. The race for the Senate is on -- and it's time for us to lace up.
**[Peter, if you're able, will you be one of the final few donors we need to cross the finish line and reach our one-week fundraising goal? Contribute $5 now.](https://act.pattymurray.%3D%3D/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-210522-one-week-goal?refcode=em210523i_636&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you so much,
Patty

_ _
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.%3D%3D/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-210522-one-week-goal?refcode=em210523i_636&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
_** **_

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

John Lee, a potential Republican challenger for Nevada Governor, has already launched an assault on Gov. Steve Sisolak and his record of supporting Nevadans! There’s no nice way to put this: Republicans are lying. Since Gov. Sisolak took office, he has worked day and night to fight for Nevadans, and he has been the fearless leader we needed throughout the pandemic. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Here’s what Gov. Steve Sisolak and other Democratic leaders in Nevada are actually fighting for: \- Better public schools and education systems \- Access to quality, affordable health care \- A strong, diverse economy \- A Nevada that works for everyone Don’t let Republicans get it twisted. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for being part of this team, Elect Nevada Democrats | | If you'd like to support Elect Nevada Democrats, you can | Paid for by Home Means Nevada PAC.
